chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1768 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on exemption application For orders on stay Application For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Haji Muhammad Sulleman Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, learned Counsel for Petitioner, does not press instant Petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
